node.description: A second year college student, and the oldest of the main cast. She's a former child actress who was once regarded as a child genius, but her popularity gradually declined as she grew up. Riho is the most calculating and devious of the girls, putting more thought into managing the cafe than the owner, Hayato, himself.

A second year who attends the same college as Riho, and is the oldest of the main cast along with her. She is a talented cook who specializes in Japanese cuisine. Has a smell fetish. ~!She is revealed to be a childhood acquaintance of Hayato!~
Part-time worker for the café. Writes music for her band.
An energetic third-year high school student in the karate club, she works part-time at the Café. Her fighting style consists of moves from the Street Fighter series and other popular works.
A Tokyo U student who returned to his Grandmother's café following her passing; now interim manager.
She is the deceased grandmother of Hayato.

The head of the Hououji family and Akane's mother. She visits the café to force Akane to take up the family business, but after some dialogue, she gives up on this plan. She holds a curious connection to Hayato's grandmother, which is why she expresses no worries in leaving her daughter in his hands.
